title: SpawnMetaPlugin
description: A spawn system for your server
body:
# **SpawnMeta**

This plugin allows server administrators to easily manage the spawn point for players. It includes commands for setting the spawn location, custom join messages, and additional settings designed to enhance the player experience.

## **Main Features:**
 - Commands /setspawn and /spawn to manage the spawn location and teleport players to it.
 - Customizable welcome messages that can be set in the configuration file.
 - Custom titles and subtitles that appear on screen when a player joins the server.
 - Option to automatically teleport players to the spawn point after each login.
 - All settings are fully configurable through the config.yml file.

![welcome message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2d22b5ed9765f5c3a889f12198f5154a4094e75.png)
![commands help](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14f6617fcb7699fe73efd01237d3a0cbd2d6079d.png)

## **How to Use the Plugin:**
Setting the Spawn Point: Use the /setspawn command while standing at the desired location to set the spawn point. The command will save the location.

Teleporting to the Spawn Point: Any player can use the /spawn command to teleport to the set spawn location.

Customizing Messages and Titles: In the config.yml file, you can set custom messages with color support (using &), and use placeholders like %player% for the player’s name and \n for line breaks.

Additional Settings: You can toggle the automatic teleport to spawn on login by changing the value of login-teleport. Additionally, you can configure the join messages, titles, and their timing (fade-in, stay, fade-out) as desired.
